title: CS2 Game Events Schema
description: JSON Schema describing all game events extracted from CS2's .gameevents resource files.  Each event is defined under $defs and can be referenced individually.

server_pre_shutdown.description: server is about to be shut down

reason.description: reason why server is about to be shut down
reason why server was shut down

server_cvar.description: a server console var has changed

player_connect_full.description: player has sent final message in the connection sequence

userid.description: user ID on server (unique on server)
user ID on server (unique on server)
user ID on server (unique on server)

bot.description: true if player is a AI bot

isbot.description: true if player is a bot

weapon.description: weapon name attacker used, if not the world

teamplay_broadcast_audio.description: emits a sound to everyone on a team

sound.description: name of the sound to emit

user_data_downloaded.description: fired when achievements/stats are downloaded from Steam or XBox Live

rank.description: ranking, how interesting is this camera view
ranking, how interesting is this entity to view

hltv_message.description: a HLTV message send by moderators

hltv_chat.description: a HLTV chat msg sent by spectators

delay.description: number of seconds in killer replay delay

reason.description: reason for hltv replay status change ()

dota_combatlog_list.description: CSVCMsgList_GameEvents that are combat log events

game_message.description: a message send by game logic to everyone

game_newmap.description: send when new map is completely loaded

player_count.description: total number of players alive at the end of round, used for statistics gathering, computed on the server in the event client is in replay when receiving this message

nomusic.description: if set, don't play round end music, because action is still on-going

full_reset.description: is this a full reset of the map

player_death.description: a game event, name may be 32 characters long

assister.description: player who assisted in the kill

weapon_itemid.description: inventory item id of weapon killer used

weapon_fauxitemid.description: faux item id of weapon killer used

dominated.description: did killer dominate victim with this kill

revenge.description: did killer get revenge on victim with this kill

wipe.description: is the kill resulting in squad wipe

penetrated.description: number of objects shot penetrated before killing target

noreplay.description: if replay data is unavailable, this will be present and set to false

noscope.description: kill happened without a scope, used for death notice icon

thrusmoke.description: hitscan weapon went through smoke grenade

checkpoint.description: Is the door a checkpoint door

initiator.description: entity id of the player who initiated the vote

userid.description: The player who sees the entity

subject.description: Entindex of the entity they see

classname.description: Classname of the entity they see

entityname.description: name of the entity they see

userid.description: The player who this lesson is intended for

hint_name.description: Name of the lesson to start.  Must match instructor_lesson.txt

hint_target.description: entity id that the hint should display at. Leave empty if controller target

userid.description: The player who this lesson is intended for

hint_name.description: Name of the lesson to start.  Must match instructor_lesson.txt

instructor_server_hint_create.description: create a hint using data supplied entirely by the server/map. Intended for hints to smooth playtests before content is ready to make the hint unneccessary. NOT INTENDED AS A SHIPPABLE CRUTCH

userid.description: user ID of the player that triggered the hint

hint_name.description: what to name the hint. For referencing it again later (e.g. a kill command for the hint instead of a timeout)

hint_replace_key.description: type name so that messages of the same type will replace each other

hint_target.description: entity id that the hint should display at

hint_timeout.description: how long in seconds until the hint automatically times out, 0 = never

hint_icon_onscreen.description: the hint icon to use when the hint is onscreen. e.g. "icon_alert_red"

hint_icon_offscreen.description: the hint icon to use when the hint is offscreen. e.g. "icon_alert"

hint_activator_caption.description: the hint caption that only the activator sees e.g. "#YouPushedItGood"

hint_color.description: the hint color in "r,g,b" format where each component is 0-255

hint_icon_offset.description: how far on the z axis to offset the hint from entity origin

hint_range.description: range before the hint is culled

hint_binding.description: bindings to use when use_binding is the onscreen icon

hint_gamepad_binding.description: gamepad bindings to use when use_binding is the onscreen icon

hint_allow_nodraw_target.description: if false, the hint will dissappear if the target entity is invisible

hint_nooffscreen.description: if true, the hint will not show when outside the player view

hint_forcecaption.description: if true, the hint caption will show even if the hint is occluded

hint_local_player_only.description: if true, only the local player will see the hint

hint_name.description: The hint to stop. Will stop ALL hints with this name

game_init.description: sent when a new game is started

hcontent.description: id of this specific content (may be image or map)
id of this specific content (may be image or map)

published_file_id.description: id of the associated content package

time.description: The length of time that this bonus lasts

Pos.description: Loadout position of the bonus weapon

reset_game_titledata.description: reset user titledata; do not automatically write profile

userid.description: Player who this event applies to

vote_option.description: which option the player voted on

count.description: Number of options - up to MAX_VOTE_OPTIONS

weapon_itemid.description: inventory item id of weapon killer used

weapon_fauxitemid.description: faux item id of weapon killer used

penetrated.description: number of objects shot penetrated before killing target

noscope.description: kill happened without a scope, used for death notice icon

thrusmoke.description: hitscan weapon went through smoke grenade

distance.description: how far the bullet travelled before it hit the player

recoil_index.description: recoil index. Yes this is really a float.

userid.description: player who is planting the bomb
player who is planting the bomb
player pawn who picked up the bomb
player who picked up the defuser

attacker.description: user ID who killed the VIP

item.description: either a weapon such as 'tmp' or 'hegrenade', or an item such as 'nvgs'
either a weapon such as 'tmp' or 'hegrenade', or an item such as 'nvgs'
either a weapon such as 'tmp' or 'hegrenade', or an item such as 'nvgs'
either a weapon such as 'tmp' or 'hegrenade', or an item such as 'nvgs'

round_prestart.description: sent before all other round restart actions

round_poststart.description: sent after all other round restart actions

attacker.description: user ID who threw the flash

victim.description: endindex of the one who was killed

dominated.description: did killer dominate victim with this kill

revenge.description: did killer get revenge on victim with this kill

bonus.description: did killer kill with a bonus weapon?

numPlayers.description: number of active players on both T and CT

userid.description: user ID who received the c4

nextlevel_changed.description: a game event, name may be 32 characters long

type.description: type of crate (metal, wood, or paradrop)
type of crate (metal, wood, or paradrop)
type of crate (metal, wood, or paradrop)
type of crate (metal, wood, or paradrop)
